cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky: [hlp]nejdřív nastavte barvu, pak nakreslete čáru[/hlp] (2× — červená a modrá).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="22" y="26"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="200" y="26"><field name="COLOUR">#ff0000</field></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="22" y="120"><field name="COLOUR">#0000ff</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="200" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="50" y="50"><field name="COLOUR">#ff0000</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed"><field name="COLOUR">#0000ff</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
